{{Infobox technique
| name = Hollow Spear
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Hollow Spear Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Hollow [[Spear]], also known as the [[Spear]] of the [[Hollow King]], is a [[Striker technique]] associated with the [[Path of the Hollow King]]. This path utilizes [[pure madra]] characterized by the property of [[Emptiness]], which functions by diluting and replacing other aspects of madra. The technique can manifest as a lance or spear composed of blue-white madra, and in its more advanced forms, it can take on a detailed physical appearance. The [[Spear]] serves several tactical functions: it is effective at breaking enemy techniques, disrupting the formation of [[Enforcer]] abilities, and can inflict spiritual damage. When infused with [[soulfire]], it becomes a highly efficient conductor for both [[madra]] and [[soulfire]]. In certain applications, the technique can be projected from other weapons, such as a pair of silver scissors, creating a combination of a [[sacred instrument]] and a [[Striker technique]]. The [[Spear]]'s power varies depending on the environment and the user's concentration; while it can be used to strike powerful entities like a [[Sage]] or a [[Dreadgod]], its effectiveness may be diminished by suppression fields or boundaries.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Hollow Spear]] is a [[Striker technique]] that uses a hyper-compressed beam of [[pure madra]] to stab through [[madra]]-based defenses.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] launched a [[Hollow King]]’s [[Spear]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Hollow King]]’s [[Spear]] is a lance of [[pure madra]] that conducts willpower well.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] threw a [[Hollow Spear]] at the [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Hollow King]]’s [[Spear]] is a [[Striker technique]] used by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Spear]] of the [[Hollow King]] and breath of a black dragon struck the [[Wandering Titan]] in the eye.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Hollow Spear]] is an advanced weapon.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Hollow Spear]] technique is a blend of [[sacred instrument]] and [[Striker technique]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Hollow King]]'s [[Spear]] pierced the serpentine [[dragon]] as a [[Striker technique]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
